# terrible_ngine_io_cloudstack_service_offering (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the service offering.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `cpu_number` (Number) The number of CPUs of the service offering.
- `cpu_speed` (Number) The CPU speed of the service offering in MHz.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `deployment_planner` (String) The deployment planner heuristics used to deploy a VM of this offering. If not set, the value of global config *vm.deployment.planner* is used.
- `disk_bytes_read_rate` (Number) Bytes read rate of the disk offering.
- `disk_bytes_write_rate` (Number) Bytes write rate of the disk offering.
- `disk_iops_max` (Number) Max. iops of the compute offering.
- `disk_iops_min` (Number) Min. iops of the compute offering.
- `disk_iops_read_rate` (Number) IO requests read rate of the disk offering.
- `disk_iops_write_rate` (Number) IO requests write rate of the disk offering.
- `display_text` (String) Display text of the service offering. If not set, *name* will be used as *display_text* while creating.
- `domain` (String) Domain the service offering is related to. Public for all domains and subdomains if not set.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `host_tags` (String) The host tags for this service offering.
- `hypervisor_snapshot_reserve` (Number) Hypervisor snapshot reserve space as a percent of a volume. Only for managed storage using Xen or VMware.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `is_customized` (Boolean) Whether the offering is customizable or not.
- `is_iops_customized` (Boolean) Whether compute offering iops is custom or not.
- `is_system` (Boolean) Whether it is a system VM offering or not.
- `is_volatile` (Boolean) Whether the virtual machine needs to be volatile or not. Every reboot of VM the root disk is detached then destroyed and a fresh root disk is created and attached to VM.
- `limit_cpu_usage` (Boolean) Restrict the CPU usage to committed service offering.
- `memory` (Number) The total memory of the service offering in MB.
- `network_rate` (Number) Data transfer rate in Mb/s allowed. Supported only for non-system offering and system offerings having *system_vm_type=domainrouter*.
- `offer_ha` (Boolean) Whether HA is set for the service offering.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `provisioning_type` (String) Provisioning type used to create volumes.
- `service_offering_details` (String) Details for planner, used to store specific parameters. A list of dictionaries having keys `key` and `value`.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) State of the service offering.
- `storage_tags` (String) The storage tags for this service offering.
- `storage_type` (String) The storage type of the service offering.
- `system_vm_type` (String) The system VM type. Required if *is_system=yes*.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `created` (String) Date the offering was created
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
